title: Short benchmark title
claim_to_evaluate: Plain-language message or headline to evaluate
baseline_goal: Explain whether the claim is confirmed, denied, or still uncertain without mixing fact and judgment.

sources.name: AP
sources.support: Short note on what this source adds

credibility_reference.expected_judgment: Moderate confidence only. Treat the item as a live signal, not a settled outcome.

rollback.rollback_rule: Rollback if the output overstates certainty, omits key conflicts, or loses source traceability.

notes.winner_pattern_hint: State confirmed facts first, then unresolved points, then the credibility judgment.
notes.loser_pattern_hint: Treating one loud claim as if it were a verified final outcome.
